input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(140, 8, 10) none no-repeat scroll 50% 50% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(15, 22, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
